allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''backend'' -Recurse 2>$null | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count; Get-ChildItem -Path ''frontend'' -Recurse 2>$null | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count")

Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path ''backend'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path ''frontend'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''EMAIL_SETUP_GUIDE.md'',''FOLDER_STRUCTURE.md'',''PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md'',''SECURITY.md'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
